quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.CfnAbo:
A heat map.

For more information, see [Using heat maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/heat-map.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.Action.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.ChartC.Description: The configuration of a heat map.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.Column.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.Subtit.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.heatmapvisual.Visual.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
